_comment: Prefer `mnemo setup --auto` instead of hand-editing config files. End users install mnemo only from GitHub Releases prebuilt binaries; there is no PyPI, pipx, npm, brew, or uvx install path.

auto_generated_stdio._usage: Shape generated by `mnemo setup --auto`. The real command should be the absolute path to the installed mnemo binary.

cursor_stdio._usage: Manual Cursor template only for debugging. Prefer `mnemo setup --auto`. Restart Cursor after editing.

claude_desktop_stdio._usage: Manual Claude Desktop template only for debugging. Prefer `mnemo setup --auto`. Restart Claude Desktop after editing.

http_shared_backend._usage: Use when multiple clients need to share one mnemo backend or when using /viz. Configure with `mnemo setup --mode http --port 8787`, then keep `mnemo serve --port 8787` running.

dev_local_venv._usage: Development only — runs directly from a local clone with an explicit interpreter. Do not use this as the end-user install path.
